title: PayPal Alternatives for Nigerian Creators: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria with a valuable product to sell. But every time you try to use PayPal, you're met with a stern message: 'We cannot process payments from your country.' You've tried Stripe, only to find out it's also not allowed. Gumroad and Payhip are no better. Your hard-earned income is stuck because of arbitrary restrictions. It's time to break free from these limitations and explore a more inclusive payment solution. You're not alone in this struggle, and I'm here to guide you through the process of finding a PayPal alternative that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal alternatives often promise a lot but deliver little. Most require you to create an account, follow complex setup processes, and deal with steep fees. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a straightforward payment processor that integrates seamlessly with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect. With NOWPayments, you can start selling your digital products in minutes, without the hassle of creating an account or dealing with KYC restrictions. You'll also enjoy automated delivery, PDF receipts, and real-time analytics through Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict policies against processing payments from certain countries. Gumroad and Payhip follow suit, making it difficult for creators from these regions to monetize their work. NOWPayments, however, does not have such restrictions. You can sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about being blocked or restricted. This is because NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that doesn't require KYC verification, making it an ideal solution for creators in restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge high fees, often ranging from 2.9% to 4.5% per transaction. Gumroad and Payhip also apply their own fees, making it difficult for creators to retain a significant portion of their earnings. NOWPayments, however, offers competitive pricing and low fees, starting from 0.5% per transaction. You'll also enjoy fast payment processing, with funds deposited directly into your wallet in minutes.
Crypto-native payment processors are not just for cryptocurrency traders; they're a viable solution for digital creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for delivery and order management. Gumroad and Payhip also have limitations when it comes to automation. NOWPayments, however, integrates seamlessly with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, allowing for instant automated delivery and order management through the Admin Dashboard. This means you can focus on creating more content, while Unchained Commerce handles the payment and delivery process for you.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're looking for a PayPal alternative that's easy to use, fast, and secure, NOWPayments is the way to go. With its seamless integration with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can start selling your digital products in minutes, without the hassle of creating an account or dealing with KYC restrictions. Whether you're a solo creator or a team, NOWPayments offers a scalable solution that meets your needs.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Yes, you can definitely sell your digital products online without PayPal or Stripe. NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that integrates seamlessly with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, making it an ideal solution for creators in restricted countries. With its competitive pricing, fast payment processing, and automated delivery capabilities, NOWPayments is the perfect alternative to PayPal.
Breaking free from PayPal's restrictions requires a willingness to explore alternative payment solutions like NOWPayments.

If you're struggling to find a payment solution that works for you, consider exploring other alternatives like cryptocurrency-based payment processors. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or software, a crypto-native payment processor like NOWPayments can help you break free from PayPal's restrictions.

To start selling your digital products online without PayPal or Stripe, follow these concrete action steps: (1) Sign up for an Unchained Commerce account and purchase Web3 Wallet Connect; (2) Integrate NOWPayments with your Unchained Commerce account; (3) Set up your payment options and configure automated delivery; (4) Create your digital products and list them for sale; (5) Start selling and earning revenue through NOWPayments.
